output_lean:
theorem blaschke_convergence_condition 
    (f : ℂ → ℂ) 
    (h_analytic : AnalyticOn ℂ f (Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1))
    (h_bounded : ∃ M, ∀ z ∈ Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1, ‖f z‖ ≤ M)
    (h_not_identically_zero : ∃ z ∈ Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1, f z ≠ 0)
    (zeros : ℕ → ℂ)
    (h_zeros_in_disc : ∀ n, ‖zeros n‖ < 1)
    (h_are_zeros : ∀ n, f (zeros n) = 0)
    : Summable fun n => 1 - ‖zeros n‖ := sorry
